items.title: Just $22 today gets you this Baseus 100W 3-port USB-C GaN charger (56% off)
items.summary:
Baseus EnerFill 100W 3-Port USB-C Wall Charger

Buy for $22 (Reg. $50)

Apply Y9FYVSMV during checkout.

What we love

This 100W Baseus charger includes two USB-C ports and one USB-A port, allowing you to charge up to three devices at the same time. Each USB-C port can deliver up to 100W on its own, though it drops to 65W when all three ports are in use. It’s a solid pick for anyone who wants to avoid carrying multiple chargers, and the compact design with foldable prongs makes it easy to travel with.

Folks with Prime did see an exclusive drop to $270 all the way back in July of last year, but in terms of general markdowns, this is the best Amazon has to offer so far in 2026. items.title: Xbox Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass gets a price cut, but there’s a catch
items.summary:
One of the most notable changes to the Xbox ecosystem since the new CEO stepped in is a price cut for both Xbox Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass, which takes effect today. The new pricing has Game Pass Ultimate dropping from $29.99 to $22.99 per month, while PC Game Pass falls to $13.99, down from $16.49. The rest of the Game Pass lineup isn’t seeing any adjustments, so those tiers remain at the same rates introduced after Microsoft’s price increase last October. Head below for more details.

items.title: With US spy laws set to expire, lawmakers are split over protecting Americans from warrantless surveillance
